hooks_proven_performers.source: Derived from hook-taxonomy.json + specimen analysis + teaching frameworks
hooks_proven_performers.description: Top-performing hooks ranked by overall effectiveness, with virality scoring alignment and proven performance patterns

dimensions.attention_capture: How effectively does this hook stop the scroll? (1-10)
dimensions.retention_power: How well does this hook drive content completion? (1-10)
dimensions.share_propensity: How likely is this hook to trigger sharing/reposting? (1-10)
dimensions.save_propensity: How likely is this hook to trigger saves/bookmarks? (1-10)
dimensions.comment_generation: How likely is this hook to generate comments? (1-10)
dimensions.platform_versatility: How many platforms does this hook work on? (1-10)
dimensions.brand_safety: How safe is this hook for professional/brand use? (1-10)

scoring_methodology.composite_score: (attention_capture × 2 + retention_power × 2 + share_propensity × 1.5 + save_propensity × 1 + comment_generation × 1 + platform_versatility × 1 + brand_safety × 0.5) / 10
scoring_methodology.rsf_alignment: Maps to RSF (Reaction-Sharing Formula): SCORE = (EA × SC × PI × PF × SH) / 10,000

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Bypasses the conscious 'should I watch?' decision by placing the viewer inside a scene mid-action. Creates the highest watch-through rates of any hook type because the narrative is already in motion — the brain needs resolution.
proven_patterns: 'I was standing in [specific place] when [unexpected thing happened]...'
'The email landed at 3am. Subject line: [shocking subject]...'
'Three words changed everything: [three words]...'
'[Sound effect/action] — and that's when I realized...'

teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: Stories as STEPPS driver — the narrative container that carries the viral payload
teaching_alignment.heath_made_to_stick: Unexpected element within concrete story creates maximum stickiness
teaching_alignment.mckee_storynomics: Inciting incident at the opening — the story structure that hooks without setup
teaching_alignment.kane_hook_point: 3-second rule — in media res is the only story hook that works within Kane's window

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Creates an open loop the brain literally cannot ignore. The Zeigarnik effect (unfinished tasks occupy mental space) makes this the most reliable hook across all platforms and content types. Works for video, text, and visual content equally well.
proven_patterns: 'The {one thing} most {professionals} get wrong about {topic}...'
'I spent {time} studying {X} and found something nobody talks about...'
'There's a reason {surprising outcome} happens, and it's not what you think...'
'The {X} mistake that's silently killing your {Y}...'

teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: Social currency — sharing 'insider knowledge' signals intelligence
teaching_alignment.heath_made_to_stick: Unexpected gaps in knowledge create the most powerful curiosity
teaching_alignment.schwartz_breakthrough: Calibrate the gap to awareness level — don't reveal what they don't know they don't know
teaching_alignment.kane_hook_point: Gap must be specific enough to feel solvable but surprising enough to stop scrolling

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Triggers the highest comment generation of any hook type. Comments are the strongest engagement signal on most platforms. The contrarian position also creates organic amplification — both supporters AND critics share/respond, doubling distribution.
proven_patterns: 'Unpopular opinion: {widely held belief} is completely wrong. Here's why...'
'I stopped doing {common practice} and {surprising positive result}...'
'{Industry norm} is actually the worst thing you can do for {outcome}...'
'Everyone says {X}. I think the opposite is true...'

teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: High-arousal emotion (surprise/anger) drives sharing. Contrarian takes activate both
teaching_alignment.heath_made_to_stick: Unexpected = the U in SUCCESs. Contrarian positions are unexpected by definition
teaching_alignment.godin_this_is_marketing: Tension creation — the discomfort of having a belief challenged drives action
teaching_alignment.cialdini_influence: Commitment/consistency — people who agree will publicly defend the position

proven_performers_ranked.warning: Brand safety score is lower (6/10). Contrarian takes can alienate. Must be backed by evidence and delivered with expertise, not arrogance. Works best from established authority positions.

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Highest attention capture score of any hook type. On video-first platforms (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts), the first frame is the entire hook. Visual interrupts bypass cognitive processing — they're processed by the amygdala before the prefrontal cortex can decide 'not interested.'
proven_patterns: [Unexpected juxtaposition in first frame — luxury item in unexpected setting]
[Movement/action already in progress — mid-jump, mid-throw, mid-transformation]
[Text overlay that contradicts the visual — creates cognitive dissonance]
[Extreme close-up or unusual angle of familiar object]

teaching_alignment.kane_hook_point: The 3-second world requires visual hooks first, verbal hooks second
teaching_alignment.heath_made_to_stick: Concrete + unexpected = maximum stickiness for visual content
teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: Public visibility (the P in STEPPS) — visual content that's remarkable gets shared

proven_performers_ranked.note: Platform-limited — primarily effective on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Less effective on LinkedIn and X (text-first platforms).

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Creates an implicit contract: 'If this bold claim is true, the content is worth my time.' The audience watches/reads to verify. This verification drive creates strong retention AND generates comments from both believers and skeptics.
proven_patterns: 'I made {$X} in {short time} using this one strategy...'
'This single change {dramatic improvement} in {days}...'
'I tried {extreme thing} for {time period} and the results were insane...'
'{Surprising result} by doing the opposite of what everyone recommends...'

teaching_alignment.hormozi_100m_leads: Results proof = the hook. Specific numbers create credibility if they can be backed up
teaching_alignment.brunson_dotcom_secrets: The epiphany bridge starts with a bold claim about what's possible
teaching_alignment.schwartz_breakthrough: Direct claims work at the 'Product Aware' and 'Most Aware' levels only

proven_performers_ranked.warning: Must deliver on the claim. Bold claims without proof destroy trust permanently. Best when the creator has genuine results to showcase.

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Activates tribal identity — the most powerful psychological driver of sharing behavior. Per Berger's research, people share content that signals their identity. Us-vs-them hooks make sharing an act of self-definition.
proven_patterns: 'There are two types of {people}: those who {our way} and those who {their way}...'
'Amateurs do {X}. Professionals do {Y}...'
'If you {our behavior}, you already know why {insight}...'
'{Our approach} vs {their approach} — the results speak for themselves...'

teaching_alignment.godin_this_is_marketing: 'People like us do things like this' — identity-based marketing at its core
teaching_alignment.hanlon_primal_branding: The 'Pagans/Nonbelievers' primal code — defining who you're NOT for
teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: Social currency — sharing 'us vs them' content signals tribal membership

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: The before/after structure is hardwired into human cognition. Starting at the low point creates empathy + curiosity about the resolution. This hook type has the highest correlation with saves (people bookmark transformation content for future motivation).
proven_patterns: 'Two years ago I was {specific bad state}. Today I {specific good state}. Here's what changed...'
'I went from {failure metric} to {success metric} by changing {one thing}...'
'Rock bottom looked like {vivid description}. I didn't know it was the beginning...'
'Before: {old approach}. After: {new approach}. The difference was {specific change}...'

teaching_alignment.miller_storybrand: Character with a problem → meets a guide. Transformation start IS the character introduction
teaching_alignment.brunson_dotcom_secrets: The attractive character backstory — vulnerability creates connection
teaching_alignment.mckee_storynomics: Beginning at the inciting incident — the moment of change

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: Loss aversion (Kahneman) means people feel the pain of missing out 2x more than the pleasure of gaining. FOMO hooks exploit this asymmetry — the audience engages not to gain value but to avoid losing status.
proven_patterns: 'Everyone's already doing {X} and you're still stuck on {Y}...'
'This {trend/strategy} is blowing up right now and most people don't know about it...'
'While you were sleeping, {industry change} happened...'
'If you haven't started {X} yet, you're already behind...'

teaching_alignment.cialdini_influence: Scarcity principle — perceived scarcity of information increases value
teaching_alignment.berger_contagious: Triggers (the T in STEPPS) — environmental triggers remind people to share

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: The two-phase emotional response (defensiveness → curiosity) creates the highest average watch-through rates. People NEED to see if the criticism applies to them. Even those who disagree watch to the end to formulate their counter-argument.
proven_patterns: 'If you're still doing {outdated practice}, this is why your {metric} is suffering...'
'I'm going to say something that 90% of {professionals} won't want to hear...'
'Stop {common behavior}. It's the #1 reason {negative outcome}...'
'This is the {X} mistake I see {professionals} make every single day...'

teaching_alignment.schwartz_breakthrough: Problem Aware content — calling out the problem they know they have
teaching_alignment.kane_hook_point: Pattern interrupt through personal relevance — 'Is this about ME?'

proven_performers_ranked.warning: Lowest brand safety score in top 10. Call outs can feel aggressive. Must come from a place of genuine expertise and care, not superiority. Best when targeting behaviors, not people.

proven_performers_ranked.why_top_performer: The safest high-performer — works on every platform, every content type, and every brand. Numbers create specificity that signals credibility ('{7} mistakes' feels more researched than 'some mistakes'). The structured format creates natural retention through each item.
proven_patterns: '{Number} {things/mistakes/strategies} that {outcome}...'
'I spent {time} studying {topic} and found {number} patterns...'
'{Number} lessons from {impressive experience}...'
'The {number}-step framework for {desired result}...'

teaching_alignment.heath_made_to_stick: Concrete numbers make abstract ideas sticky. SUCCESs principle 'Concrete' in action
teaching_alignment.hormozi_100m_leads: Specificity in hooks increases perceived value and credibility

hook_combination_formulas.description: The most powerful hooks combine 2-3 types for compounding effect

proven_combinations.name: The Authority Bomb
proven_combinations.example: 'I made $500K by doing the OPPOSITE of what every guru teaches...'

proven_combinations.name: The Empathy Bridge
proven_combinations.example: 'I know exactly how it feels to [pain]. Two years ago I was there. Here's what changed...'

proven_combinations.name: The Tribal Trigger
proven_combinations.example: 'Winners do [X]. Everyone else does [Y]. And the data proves it...'

proven_combinations.name: The Value Lock
proven_combinations.formula: Number Reveal + How-To Promise + Free Value
proven_combinations.example: '7 strategies that took me from [X] to [Y] — saving this post could save you years...'

awareness_content.description: Top-of-funnel content to reach new audiences

engagement_content.description: Content designed to deepen relationship with existing audience

conversion_content.description: Content designed to drive specific action (follow, click, buy)

community_content.description: Content designed to build tribe and deepen loyalty
